title: Innodata Inc. (INOD) Expands Role as AI Data Engineering Partner
text: Innodata Inc. continues to expand its role as a critical AI data engineering partner to the world's leading technology companies and government agencies. The company operates through three segments: Digital Data Solutions (DDS) offering AI-enabled software platforms and managed services, Synodex providing data engineering support, and Agility. The DDS segment—the primary growth engine—provides comprehensive data services including annotation, transformation, curation, hygiene, consolidation, compliance, and master data management. Customer diversification is materializing across multiple fronts. Revenue from Innodata's broader customer base (excluding single largest customer) has grown 453% year-over-year, demonstrating rapid expansion beyond historical concentration. The company has secured contracts with five of the Magnificent Seven tech giants and is deepening adoption across pretraining, mid-training, post-training, and evaluation services. New wins include $51 million Big Tech engagement, $68 million in pretraining data contracts across five customers, $25 million federal market opportunity, and $1 million AI evaluation platform engagement. Balance sheet expansion shows cash growing to $117.4 million with undrawn $50 million credit facility, enabling sustained investment. Management projects continued strong growth momentum, raising 2026 guidance to 40%+ from prior 35%+. Analyst consensus rates INOD as Strong Buy with price targets in the $90-$110 range, suggesting the market believes significant value creation potential remains.
